privileged_info_summary: The backpacking itinerary task uses synthetic trail data with 14 segments (not 15 as claimed) across 7 days. Total cumulative distance is 67.9 miles, within the claimed 65-70 mile range. Hiking time is calculated using the formula (Distance/2.5) + (Elevation_Gain/1000). Day 3 is problematic with a 3200 ft elevation segment (5.8 hours) and 3800 ft total daily elevation. Day 4 is also problematic with 10.1 hours total hiking time. The elevation threshold of 3000 ft is justified by the data. No individual segments exceed 6 hours. The task difficulty is medium with a 180-second timeout and 15 maximum steps.
